⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Am I compliant? →

Language Access Services — California

Serving California government agencies,
school districts, and healthcare organizations.

Certified translation, professional interpretation, ADA/Section 508 compliance, and AI automation for California public agencies. NASPO ValuePoint cooperative contract Active Participating Addendum available. Veteran-owned. All languages.

NASPO EligibleGSA ScheduleTitle VISection 508
Confirm Contract Vehicle → Compliance FAQ
California NASPO Status: Active PA — California agencies can issue task orders directly

California is one of the largest NASPO participant states. Contact us to confirm your agency ordering path. Contact us to confirm your agency's specific ordering path.

California agency inquiry

Tell us about your agency. We confirm your contract vehicle and respond within 2 hours.

NASPO & GSA contracts · Same-day confirmation
Services for California agencies

Every language access service California agencies
are legally required to provide.

🔤

Certified Translation

ATA-certified translation for legal, medical, government, and academic documents. 300+ language pairs. USCIS accepted. 24–72 hour delivery.

View Translation Services →
🎙️

Professional Interpretation

OPI, VRI, and in-person interpretation for government service encounters, hearings, and community events. Available 24/7 in 300+ languages.

Book Interpreter →
♿

ADA / Section 508 Compliance

California state and local agencies face the April 2026 ADA Title II WCAG 2.1 AA deadline. We audit, remediate, and certify compliance — starting with a free assessment.

Start Free Assessment →
Ordering for California agencies

No new procurement. Order on your California NASPO contract today.

Contact us to confirm your specific ordering path via NASPO ValuePoint or GSA Schedule. We respond the same business day with all required documentation for your procurement file.

Confirm My Contract Vehicle →

on your existing contract.
